Hello Prags,

We've updated settings that manage personalisation and activity history on Play. You'll have dedicated controls for personalisation on Play and for saving activity in your Google Account's Play History, and these settings will be easily accessible in the Google Play menu.

In the past, personalisation and history on Play were managed by Web & App Activity (WAA) settings in your Google Account. Going forwards, WAA will no longer control Play personalisation and Play History. Instead, you'll be able to manage those settings directly on Play, and you'll see this change in your account in the next few days. Learn more about Play personalisation and Play History <http://support.google.com/googleplay?p=personalize_play_migration>

When the transition happens for your account, your Play settings will be based on the most recent choice that you made in WAA, so your experience will stay the same. If you have WAA turned on during the transition, which is happening over the next few days, then your Play personalisation and Play History settings will be on, and if WAA is off, then Play personalisation and Play History will be off. As before, you’ll be able to choose how long your activity is saved in your Play History and if you want to delete it from Play History manually or automatically.

After the transition is complete, WAA and Play settings will be separate, and changes to one will no longer affect the other. You can view and change your Play privacy settings in Personalisation in Play <https://myactivity.google.com/product/google_play/personalization> at any time. Learn more about the transition and how it affects your settings <http://support.google.com/googleplay?p=personalize_play_migration>

Hi Prags,

First round of 2026 updates are in! This release helps Notion fit into your world even better. Work on the go, choose your AI models, and track what matters to your team.

**************************
AI Meeting Notes on mobile
**************************

AI Meeting Notes on mobile ( https://www.notion.com/mobile?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Whether you’re joining a call while commuting, brainstorming on your morning walk, or meeting without laptops, everything just works on mobile the way you’d hope. Start transcribing in one tap (even when you switch apps or lock your screen) and summarize everything in a shareable doc. Not on mobile yet? Get the Notion app here ( https://www.notion.com/mobile?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ).

******************************
Your Agent fits in your pocket
******************************

Your Agent fits in your pocket ( https://x.com/akothari/status/2007140306677055931?s=20&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Everything your Notion Agent can do on desktop, it now does on your phone. Build forms, create databases, search your company’s brain. Think of an item on your to-do list, hand it off to your agent, and it will work in the background while you move onto your next task. No more waiting. Here’s a live demo ( https://x.com/akothari/status/2007140306677055931?s=20&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) of what Notion Agent
can do.

***********************
New models, same memory
***********************

New models, same memory ( http://notion.so/?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

When a new model drops, it’s ready in Notion. You can now pick from GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, or Gemini 3. Or let Auto select the best model for the job. Switch between them freely while your context stays with you. Models will continue to change, but your memory in Notion doesn’t.

***************************************
Understand how your team uses Notion AI
***************************************

Understand how your team uses Notion AI ( http://notion.so/?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Enterprise admins now have clear visibility into AI usage over time. See who’s using it most, which features drive engagement, and where AI delivers value. Go to Settings → Analytics → AI to access. More insights coming soon.

****************
People Directory
****************

People Directory ( https://www.notion.com/help/people-directory?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

The new People Directory shows everyone in your workspace. It’s a pre-built database you can customize or import from HR systems (learn more ( https://www.notion.com/help/people-directory?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )). Check it out by searching for “People” or go to Settings → Members → View People Directory (it’s on the top right).

**************************
Do more with Notion & Jira
**************************

Do more with Notion & Jira ( https://www.notion.com/help/jira?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

The improved Jira integration ( https://www.notion.com/help/jira?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) is for teams where engineers live in Jira, but everyone else plans in Notion. Sync development work from Jira, then add your own Notion properties right alongside it—quarterly goals, customer feedback, revenue impact. Build dashboards that combine both, so you see the full picture. On Enterprise, edit key Jira fields directly from Notion and sync changes back automatically.

****************************
Multi-account on Notion Mail
****************************

Multi-account on Notion Mail ( https://www.notion.com/help/get-started-with-notion-mail?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io#download-notion-mail )

Manage multiple email addresses under one Notion account. Switch between personal and work inboxes easily. A lot of you have been waiting for this one, so thank you for your patience. We hope you give Notion Mail a try ( https://www.notion.com/help/get-started-with-notion-mail?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io#download-notion-mail )!

*****************
More improvements
*****************

* Big desktop performance improvements: Pages on Windows open 27% faster, Mac desktop is up +11%.This chart ( https://x.com/ivanhzhao/status/2001834160198197305?s=20&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) is one of our most meaningful from 2025. It shows pages now load in one third less time. And we’ll keep improving!
* Hide Calendar panel: You can hide the context panel now for a full view of your calendar (see the demo ( https://x.com/NotionCalendar/status/1995939070154080553?s=20&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )).
* Mail to Notion pages: Save emails directly to Notion pages for project documentation and reference.
* In-page find knows diacritics: Searching on a page for words with accents like “café” or “naïve” now works exactly how you’d expect.
* Confetti effect in automations: Add a little celebration for your automations — like this ( https://www.linkedin.com/posts/matthiasfrankprofile_so-i-guess-this-just-happened-notion-activity-7407336436582068224-Yzh3?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAASwbfgBDD6e1rYFMC4ggWjFn4pUkVaN0Vw&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )!
* Notion MCP improvements for Enterprise: Track MCP activity in audit logs and query multiple databases. Soon, you’ll also be able to control which external AI tools can connect to your workspace.

Thanks for being with us. Big year ahead.

Ivan

P.S. Last year brought Agents, AI Notes, Enterprise Search, offline mode, database permissions, and 90+ features. Here’s a database with everything released in 2025 ( https://notion.notion.site/2025?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ).

In one AI-powered workspace.
